scope_mismatch: clinicId does not match x-clinic-id scope
belongs_to_clinic: {resource} does not belong to the requested clinic
patient_not_found_term: Patient with id, email, firstName or lastName "{term}" not found
record_exists_patient: Clinical record already exists for patient {patientId}
appointment_overlap: Appointment overlaps with an existing slot
user_inactive: User is inactive, talk with an admin
header_clinic_required: x-clinic-id header with valid UUID is required
auth_no_membership: User does not have active membership for the requested clinic
payment_exceeds_balance: Payment amount exceeds pending invoice balance
same_patient_required: Treatment and clinical record must belong to the same patient
